---
title: "Frances Heitkemper"

about:
    template: solana
    links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/francesheitkemper
      target: _blank
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/francesheitkemper
      target: _blank 
    - text: Email
      href: frances.heitkemper@gmail.com
---

I am a rising sophomore (class of 2029) at Haverford College, interested in majoring in statistics and minoring in computer science, economics, and German.
